grid.label: THE GRID

safety_flags: No backend control surface is exposed.
No wallet signing, live trading, supplier outreach, or inventory action is authorized.
No .env or secret files are read.
Missing data is reported as unknown instead of fabricated.

open_tickets.title: Connect APEX paper trade log
open_tickets.evidence: No supported APEX JSONL trade log was found in the configured APEX directory.
open_tickets.recommendation: Point THE_GRID_APEX_DIR to the folder containing the paper trade log or copy a supported JSONL log into the default location.

open_tickets.title: Add backtester state handoff
open_tickets.evidence: APEX_BACKTESTER_STATE.md is not present in THE GRID root.
open_tickets.recommendation: Copy the current backtester state summary into the GRID root when available.

research_and_development_proposals.title: APEX Entry Timing v1
research_and_development_proposals.evidence_basis: Waiting for APEX paper log connection.
research_and_development_proposals.recommendation: Compare winners and losers by token age, discovery-to-entry lag, 5m pump, mcap bucket, re-entry status, and confidence boost source before changing live rules.

research_and_development_proposals.title: Commerce Gate A Phase A2 Quote Plan
research_and_development_proposals.evidence_basis: Phase A1 public-data status is available.
research_and_development_proposals.recommendation: Prepare exact supplier quote questions only after the public-data model remains plausible.

research_and_development_proposals.title: Knowledge Vault Data Shape
research_and_development_proposals.evidence_basis: Project documentation exists, but persistence is intentionally not built.
research_and_development_proposals.recommendation: Define mission logs, decision history, and prompt library schemas before persistence work begins.

council_briefing.briefing: v0.3 should remain a read-only visibility layer. The bridge can reveal gaps without becoming a control system.
Safety locks remain active: no autonomous execution, no wallet signing, no live trading, no supplier spend.
Project log is available for context.
Commerce status can be reviewed from the root handoff doc.
APEX log is not connected; entry-timing claims must wait for evidence.
CLU log exists for paper-only review.
